data_text_storyteller.inc.gTextStoryteller_Introduction: I'm the STORYTELLER.\nI'll tell you tales of legendary\lTRAINERS.\pWill you hear my tale?
data_text_storyteller.inc.gTextStoryteller_WhichTale: I know of these legends.\nWhich tale will you have me tell?
data_text_storyteller.inc.gTextStoryteller_ButIKnowOfNoLegendaryTr: But, I know of no legendary TRAINERS.\nHence, I know no tales.\pWhere does one find a TRAINER worthy\nof a legendary tale?
data_text_storyteller.inc.gTextStoryteller_BirthOfANewLegend:
What's that?!
You... You...\p{STR_VAR_2}
{STR_VAR_1} time(s)?!\pThat is indeed magnificent!
It's the birth of a new legend!
data_text_storyteller.inc.gTextStoryteller_CouldThereBeOtherTraine: It gets me thinking, could there be\nother TRAINERS with more impressive\llegends awaiting discovery?
data_text_storyteller.inc.gTextStoryteller_HaveYouAnyTales: Are you a TRAINER?\pThen tell me, have you any tales that\nare even remotely legendary?
data_text_storyteller.inc.gTextStoryteller_HearAnotherLegendaryTal: Incidentally... Would you care to hear\nanother legendary tale?
data_text_storyteller.inc.gTextStoryteller_ImNotSatisfied: Hmm...\nI'm not satisfied...\pI wish you would bring me news worthy\nof being called a legend.
data_text_storyteller.inc.gTextStoryteller_WishMorePeopleWould: I wish more people would be interested\nin hearing my epic tales of legendary\lTRAINERS.
data_text_storyteller.inc.gTextStoryteller_Story1Text:
This is a tale of a TRAINER
named {STR_VAR_3}.\pThis TRAINER saved the game
{STR_VAR_1} times!\pA more cautious TRAINER than
{STR_VAR_3} one will never find!
data_text_storyteller.inc.gTextStoryteller_Story2Text:
This is a tale of a TRAINER
named {STR_VAR_3}.\pThis TRAINER started new trends
{STR_VAR_1} times!\p{STR_VAR_3} is setting trends for all
the HOENN region!
data_text_storyteller.inc.gTextStoryteller_Story3Text:
This is a tale of a TRAINER
named {STR_VAR_3}.\pThis TRAINER planted BERRIES
{STR_VAR_1} times!\p{STR_VAR_3} is a legendary lover of
BERRIES!
data_text_storyteller.inc.gTextStoryteller_Story4Text:
This is a tale of a TRAINER
named {STR_VAR_3}.\pThis TRAINER swapped BIKES
{STR_VAR_1} times!\p{STR_VAR_3} must love BIKES deeply
and passionately!
data_text_storyteller.inc.gTextStoryteller_Story5Text:
This is a tale of a TRAINER
named {STR_VAR_3}.\pThis TRAINER got interviewed
{STR_VAR_1} times!\p{STR_VAR_3} must be a TRAINER who's
attracting much attention!
data_text_storyteller.inc.gTextStoryteller_Story6Text: This is a tale of a TRAINER\nnamed {STR_VAR_3}.\pThis TRAINER battled {STR_VAR_1} times!\p{STR_VAR_3} must be a TRAINER who can\nnever refuse a chance to battle!
data_text_storyteller.inc.gTextStoryteller_Story7Text:
This is a tale of a TRAINER
named {STR_VAR_3}.\pThis TRAINER caught
{STR_VAR_1} POKéMON!\p{STR_VAR_3} is a legendary catcher of
wild POKéMON!
data_text_storyteller.inc.gTextStoryteller_Story8Text:
This is a tale of a TRAINER
named {STR_VAR_3}.\pThis TRAINER caught
{STR_VAR_1} POKéMON while fishing!\p{STR_VAR_3} is a legendary fishing
expert!
data_text_storyteller.inc.gTextStoryteller_Story9Text:
This is a tale of a TRAINER
named {STR_VAR_3}.\pThis TRAINER hatched {STR_VAR_1} POKéMON
from EGGS!\p{STR_VAR_3} is a legendary warmer
of EGGS!
data_text_storyteller.inc.gTextStoryteller_Story10Text:
This is a tale of a TRAINER
named {STR_VAR_3}.\pThis TRAINER made {STR_VAR_1} POKéMON
evolve!\p{STR_VAR_3} is the ultimate evolver
of POKéMON!
data_text_storyteller.inc.gTextStoryteller_Story11Text:
This is a tale of a TRAINER
named {STR_VAR_3}.\pThis TRAINER healed POKéMON
{STR_VAR_1} times at POKéMON CENTERS!\pThere could be no greater lover of
POKéMON CENTERS than {STR_VAR_3}!
data_text_storyteller.inc.gTextStoryteller_Story12Text:
This is a tale of a TRAINER
named {STR_VAR_3}.\pThis TRAINER healed POKéMON
{STR_VAR_1} times at home!\pThere could be no more of a homebody
than {STR_VAR_3}!
data_text_storyteller.inc.gTextStoryteller_Story13Text:
This is a tale of a TRAINER
named {STR_VAR_3}.\pThis TRAINER went into the SAFARI ZONE
{STR_VAR_1} times!\p{STR_VAR_3} is a TRAINER whose wild side
must come out in the SAFARI ZONE!
data_text_storyteller.inc.gTextStoryteller_Story14Text:
This is a tale of a TRAINER
named {STR_VAR_3}.\pThis TRAINER used CUT
{STR_VAR_1} times!\p{STR_VAR_3} is a TRAINER who just must
love to CUT!
data_text_storyteller.inc.gTextStoryteller_Story15Text:
This is a tale of a TRAINER
named {STR_VAR_3}.\pThis TRAINER used ROCK SMASH
{STR_VAR_1} times!\p{STR_VAR_3} must be a TRAINER who
can't leave a stone unsmashed!
data_text_storyteller.inc.gTextStoryteller_Story16Text:
This is a tale of a TRAINER
named {STR_VAR_3}.\pThis TRAINER moved the SECRET BASE
{STR_VAR_1} times!\p{STR_VAR_3} is a TRAINER who loves
to move houses often!
data_text_storyteller.inc.gTextStoryteller_Story17Text:
This is a tale of a TRAINER
named {STR_VAR_3}.\pThis TRAINER used SPLASH
{STR_VAR_1} times!\p{STR_VAR_3} is a TRAINER who must love
SPLASHING around!
data_text_storyteller.inc.gTextStoryteller_Story18Text:
This is a tale of a TRAINER
named {STR_VAR_3}.\pThis TRAINER had to rely on STRUGGLE
{STR_VAR_1} times!\p{STR_VAR_3} is a tenacious TRAINER
who never gives in to adversity!
data_text_storyteller.inc.gTextStoryteller_Story19Action: Won the jackpot on the SLOTS
data_text_storyteller.inc.gTextStoryteller_Story19Text:
This is a tale of a TRAINER
named {STR_VAR_3}.\pThis TRAINER won the jackpot on
the SLOTS {STR_VAR_1} times.\p{STR_VAR_3} is a TRAINER who was lucky
on the SLOTS!
data_text_storyteller.inc.gTextStoryteller_Story20Text:
This is a tale of a TRAINER
named {STR_VAR_3}.\pThis TRAINER won in ROULETTE
{STR_VAR_1} times in a row.\p{STR_VAR_3} was lucky when the ball
bounced in ROULETTE!
data_text_storyteller.inc.gTextStoryteller_Story21Text:
This is a tale of a TRAINER
named {STR_VAR_3}.\pThis TRAINER took the BATTLE TOWER
challenge {STR_VAR_1} times!\p{STR_VAR_3} is a TRAINER who aspires
for excellence in the BATTLE TOWER!
data_text_storyteller.inc.gTextStoryteller_Story22Text:
This is a tale of a TRAINER
named {STR_VAR_3}.\pThis TRAINER made {POKEBLOCK}S
{STR_VAR_1} times!\pThere is none better at using a BERRY
BLENDER than {STR_VAR_3}!
data_text_storyteller.inc.gTextStoryteller_Story23Text:
This is a tale of a TRAINER
named {STR_VAR_3}.\pThis TRAINER entered CONTESTS
{STR_VAR_1} times!\p{STR_VAR_3} must love showing off
POKéMON to others!
data_text_storyteller.inc.gTextStoryteller_Story24Text:
This is a tale of a TRAINER
named {STR_VAR_3}.\pThis TRAINER won CONTESTS
{STR_VAR_1} times!\p{STR_VAR_3} must be an incredible
CONTEST master!
data_text_storyteller.inc.gTextStoryteller_Story25Text:
This is a tale of a TRAINER
named {STR_VAR_3}.\pThis TRAINER bought items in shops
{STR_VAR_1} times!\p{STR_VAR_3} must be one of those
people who are born to shop.
data_text_storyteller.inc.gTextStoryteller_Story26Text:
This is a tale of a TRAINER
named {STR_VAR_3}.\pThis TRAINER used an ITEMFINDER
{STR_VAR_1} times!\p{STR_VAR_3} must enjoy scouring the
ground for hidden items!
data_text_storyteller.inc.gTextStoryteller_Story27Text:
This is a tale of a TRAINER
named {STR_VAR_3}.\pThis TRAINER got soaked by rain
{STR_VAR_1} times!\p{STR_VAR_3}'s charisma must even
attract rain!
data_text_storyteller.inc.gTextStoryteller_Story28Text:
This is a tale of a TRAINER
named {STR_VAR_3}.\pThis TRAINER checked a POKéDEX
{STR_VAR_1} times!\p{STR_VAR_3} must love inspecting
POKéMON in a POKéDEX!
data_text_storyteller.inc.gTextStoryteller_Story29Text:
This is a tale of a TRAINER
named {STR_VAR_3}.\pThis TRAINER received RIBBONS
{STR_VAR_1} times!\p{STR_VAR_3} must be a TRAINER who
loves to collect RIBBONS!
data_text_storyteller.inc.gTextStoryteller_Story30Text:
This is a tale of a TRAINER
named {STR_VAR_3}.\pThis TRAINER jumped down ledges
{STR_VAR_1} times!\pIf there's a ledge to be jumped,
{STR_VAR_3} can't ignore it!
data_text_storyteller.inc.gTextStoryteller_Story31Text: This is a tale of a TRAINER\nnamed {STR_VAR_3}.\pThis TRAINER watched TV\n{STR_VAR_1} times!\p{STR_VAR_3} must love watching TV!
data_text_storyteller.inc.gTextStoryteller_Story32Text:
This is a tale of a TRAINER
named {STR_VAR_3}.\pThis TRAINER checked the time
{STR_VAR_1} times!\p{STR_VAR_3} must be a punctual TRAINER
who's conscious of the time.
data_text_storyteller.inc.gTextStoryteller_Story33Text:
This is a tale of a TRAINER
named {STR_VAR_3}.\pThis TRAINER won POKéMON LOTTERIES
{STR_VAR_1} times!\p{STR_VAR_3} must have many friends
to trade POKéMON with!
data_text_storyteller.inc.gTextStoryteller_Story34Action: Left POKéMON at the DAY CARE
data_text_storyteller.inc.gTextStoryteller_Story34Text:
This is a tale of a TRAINER
named {STR_VAR_3}.\pThis TRAINER left POKéMON with the
DAY CARE {STR_VAR_1} times!\p{STR_VAR_3} must be a real go-getter
who raises POKéMON aggressively!
data_text_storyteller.inc.gTextStoryteller_Story35Text:
This is a tale of a TRAINER
named {STR_VAR_3}.\pThis TRAINER rode the CABLE CAR
{STR_VAR_1} times!\p{STR_VAR_3} must be a busy TRAINER
who's up and down all the time!
data_text_storyteller.inc.gTextStoryteller_Story36Text:
This is a tale of a TRAINER
named {STR_VAR_3}.\pThis TRAINER bathed in hot springs
{STR_VAR_1} times!\p{STR_VAR_3} must be a TRAINER with
baby-smooth skin!
